We have  
\[
w = \frac{\sqrt{3}+i}{2} = e^{i\pi/6}, \quad z = \frac{-1 + i\sqrt{3}}{2} = e^{i2\pi/3}.
\]  
The equation \( i \cdot w^r = z^s \) becomes  
\[
e^{i\pi/2} \cdot e^{i\pi r/6} = e^{i2\pi s/3} \quad\Rightarrow\quad e^{i\left(\frac{\pi}{2} + \frac{\pi r}{6}\right)} = e^{i\frac{2\pi s}{3}}.
\]  
Thus  
\[
\frac{\pi}{2} + \frac{\pi r}{6} = \frac{2\pi s}{3} + 2\pi k \quad\Rightarrow\quad 3 + r = 4s + 12k.
\]
